title: Fix Embedded Skill Templates
description: Fix critical issues in embedded skill templates: replace incorrect sl-deps content, remove duplicate sections in sl-audit, enhance skill descriptions with trigger keywords, and remove aspirational content.

title: US1: Fix sl-deps Skill Content
description: Replace incorrect sl-deps/skill.md content (currently duplicate of sl-issue-tracking) with correct guidance for sl deps commands.

title: US2: Fix sl-audit Duplicates
description: Remove duplicate sections in sl-audit/skill.md that waste ~700 tokens per skill load.

title: US3: Update Manifest Descriptions
description: Add trigger keywords to skill descriptions in manifest.yaml for reliable Claude Code activation.

title: Polish: Verify and Test Changes
description: Run embedded template tests and verify all skill file changes are correct.

title: US4: Remove Aspirational Content
description: Remove references to non-existent commands and flags from sl-audit/skill.md.

title: Rewrite sl-deps/skill.md with correct content
description: WHY: The sl-deps skill file contains incorrect content (duplicate of sl-issue-tracking) causing wrong guidance and token waste.

items.item: Comparison section distinguishes sl deps from sl issue link
No sl issue commands except in comparison section

design: File: pkg/embedded/templates/specledger/skills/sl-deps/skill.md. Follow sl-comment skill structure as reference. Include: Overview, Subcommands table (add/remove/list/resolve/link/unlink), Decision criteria (sl deps vs sl issue link), Workflow patterns, Error handling.
acceptance_criteria: File describes all 6 sl deps subcommands. File does NOT contain sl issue commands (except in comparison section). File clearly distinguishes sl deps (cross-repo) from sl issue link (inter-issue).

title: Remove duplicate sections from sl-audit/skill.md
description: WHY: Lines 239-271 are exact duplicates of lines 206-238, wasting ~700 tokens per skill load.

items.item: File line count is approximately 238 lines or less

design: File: pkg/embedded/templates/specledger/skills/sl-audit/skill.md. Delete lines 239-271 (duplicate CLI Reference and Troubleshooting sections). Verify no other duplicate content remains.
acceptance_criteria: No section appears more than once in the file. File line count reduced by approximately 33 lines.

title: Update manifest.yaml skill descriptions with trigger keywords
description: WHY: Generic skill descriptions don't help Claude Code understand when to trigger specific skills.

items.item: sl-deps description mentions cross-repo or multi-repo
sl-issue-tracking description mentions multi-session or task-tracking

design: File: pkg/embedded/templates/manifest.yaml. Update descriptions for all 4 skills to include trigger keywords and command names. Format: [Purpose] with [commands]. Use for [use cases].
acceptance_criteria: Each skill description contains at least 3 trigger keywords. sl-deps mentions cross-repo/multi-repo. sl-issue-tracking mentions multi-session/task-tracking.

title: Remove aspirational content from sl-audit/skill.md
description: WHY: References to non-existent commands and flags confuse agents about what is actually available.

items.item: Cache strategy describes manual approaches only

design: File: pkg/embedded/templates/specledger/skills/sl-audit/skill.md. Remove references to: --force flag, scripts/audit-cache.json, automated cache management. Keep manual reconnaissance patterns only.
acceptance_criteria: No reference to --force flag for sl audit command. Cache strategy sections reference manual file paths only.

title: Run tests and verify all skill changes
description: WHY: Need to verify all changes are correct and embedded templates work properly.
design: Run: go test ./pkg/embedded/... -v. Verify: sl-deps has correct content, sl-audit has no duplicates, manifest has trigger keywords, no aspirational content remains.
acceptance_criteria: All embedded template tests pass. sl-deps/skill.md content is correct. sl-audit/skill.md has no duplicates. manifest.yaml descriptions have trigger keywords.
